chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.S-400 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ Dated: Order with signature of Judge(s) For orders as to maintainability as per order dated 04.5.2023. (Statement filed by the Advocate for Petitioner) 08.05.2023:- Syed Nadeemul Haq, Advocate for Petitioner. _________ This petition is preferred against the order dated 17.04.2023 passed in G&W Application No.2089 of 2022 by the XVI Family Judge Karachi (Central). It seems that the nature of this application under Section 12 of the Guardian & Ward Act, 1890, for which an appeal is maintainable before the District & Sessions Judge Karachi (Central) as per the decisions reported in PLD 1975 Karachi 448, 1986 CLC 442, 1986 CLC 629, 1987 MLD 2563, 2018 MLD 727 & 2020 CLC 1353. When confronted with this proposition, counsel for the Petitioner stated that he does not press this petition and would prefer appeal before the District & Sessions Judge Karachi (Central). Accordingly, this petition is disposed of as not pressed along with pending application(s), if any. However, the Petitioner is at liberty to file appeal before the District & Sessions Judge Karachi (Central), if he deems appropriate. Nasir PS. JUDGE
